title: AWS Compute Spike
rootCause: New enterprise customer workloads consuming untagged compute
businessImpact: Gross margin compression on large accounts — projected 2.1% impact
recommendedAction: Review workload tagging, optimize batch jobs, evaluate reserved capacity pricing

title: Duplicate Analytics Tools
rootCause: Product and Marketing teams independently purchased overlapping analytics tools
businessImpact: $72K annual waste, data fragmentation across teams
recommendedAction: Consolidate on single analytics platform — Finance Ops to lead vendor evaluation

title: Support Contractor Increase
rootCause: Enterprise onboarding surge requiring additional contractor hours
businessImpact: Implementation margin eroding on three new enterprise accounts
recommendedAction: Identify high-cost onboarding accounts, review contractor SOW scope

title: Sales Travel Surge
rootCause: Regional field events in Q2 — aligned to planned pipeline activities
businessImpact: Minor budget variance — expected for Q2 field season
recommendedAction: Monitor through quarter end; no immediate action required

title: DataStack Renewal Pricing Increase
rootCause: Vendor renewal with 18% price increase — due in 32 days
businessImpact: $120K annual cost increase if renewed at list price
recommendedAction: Initiate renegotiation immediately; benchmark against alternatives

title: Snowflake Query Cost Spike
rootCause: Analytics team running large unoptimized queries without cost controls
businessImpact: Data platform costs growing faster than analytical output
recommendedAction: Introduce query cost alerts per team; review warehouse sizing

title: Marketing Campaign Overspend
rootCause: Paid acquisition expansion into Segment C without proportional conversion
recommendedAction: Pause Segment C campaigns; reallocate to higher-converting channels
